_meta.source: Cadastre (No Attributes) LGATE-001 — SLIP Public Services, Landgate (Western Australian Land Information Authority)
_meta.licence: SLIP Personal Use Licence — non-commercial only. Commercial/product use requires a separate Landgate licence. Contact: licensing@landgate.wa.gov.au, (08) 9273 7210.
_meta.licence_status: BLOCKED FOR COMMERCIAL USE — do not ingest into production DB without written Landgate approval. See docs/DATA_ACQUISITION_RUNBOOK.md Section 4 human-loop item 1.
_meta.scope: 3 parcel polygons, Leederville test tile. City of Vincent full BBOX: -31.958,115.836,-31.875,115.882 (lat/lon, WFS 1.1.0 order).
_meta.pull_method: WFS 1.1.0 GetFeature with BBOX in lat/lon order, OUTPUTFORMAT=GML3. Source GML converted here to GeoJSON for readability. Original GML at data/slip_cadastre_leederville_sample.gml
_meta.endpoint_status: VERIFIED 2026-06-09 — WFS 1.1.0 returned 3 parcel polygons for Leederville test BBOX. WFS 2.0.0 (lon/lat BBOX) returns 0 features. GML3 only — application/json returns HTTP 400.

field_notes.OBJECTID: Server row ID — not stored in DB (unstable)
field_notes.st_area_shape_: In decimal degrees squared — discard; compute area_m2 via ST_Area(ST_Transform(geom,7856)) in PostGIS
field_notes.lot_plan: NULL on this layer — LGATE-001 is geometry-only. Lot/plan attributes available on LGATE-217 (subscription, out of scope for demo).
field_notes.local_government: Derived by spatial join against LGA boundary layer after load — not provided by this WFS

properties._note: area_m2 and local_government must be computed after load — see field_notes above
